---
title: "CV / Contact"
---

This page provides a brief overview of my professional roles, areas of work, and contact information. A downloadable CV will be added as the site develops.

## Current Roles

- GIS Outreach Coordinator, Department of Geography & Sustainability, University of Tennessee, Knoxville

## Areas of Work

- GIS education and curriculum development
- Geospatial outreach and professional development
- UAV education, FAA Part 107 training, and applied drone workflows
- Community-engaged GIS and mapping projects
- Cartography, web GIS, and geospatial communication
- Student mentoring, undergraduate research support, and career preparation
- Professional service and geospatial community engagement

## Contact

**Email:** mcampono@utk.edu

**Institution:** University of Tennessee, Knoxville  
Department of Geography & Sustainability

## Professional Links

Links will be added here.

## Downloadable CV

A downloadable CV will be added here.
